tiktok.caption: Your FSA is about to delete $408 of YOUR own money — and your employer gets to keep it. Here's the deadline you need to know.

youtube_short.title: $408 of Your Money Vanishes Every December
title_alternatives: The FSA Rule That's Draining Your Wallet
Your Employer Is Keeping Your Tax-Free Money
youtube_short.description:
Millions of Americans set up Flexible Spending Accounts and then forget about the use-it-or-lose-it rule — handing over an average of $408 per year to their employer, completely legally. The industry pockets $1.6 billion in forfeited funds annually. FSAs cover way more than doctor visits: glasses, sunscreen, bandages, and baby gear all qualify. Pull up your balance and spend it before December 31st. #personalfinance #moneytips #FSA #savemoney #financetips

Follow for more money traps exposed every day.

hook_line: Your employer is legally keeping $408 of YOUR money
